title: cremanthodium brunneopilosum
intro: Cremanthodium brunneopilosum, also known as Brown-spined Cremastopus, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cremanthodium brunneopilosum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
